## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO progress, content strategy, and website updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SEO metrics showing positive growth: 70% increase in clicks, 46% increase in impressions month-over-month](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=57.0)
  - [Blog redesign nearly complete, set to launch end of day tomorrow with new navigation and CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [Focus shifting to conversion optimization now that traffic is increasing (200-300 new visitors/week)](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Emphasis on improving rankings for key terms like "shoppable video" and "video commerce"](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

## Topics

### SEO Performance Update

  - [Search Console data shows significant growth:](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
      - [70% increase in clicks month-over-month](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
      - [46% increase in impressions](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
      - [6% click-through rate (CTR)](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=67.0)
  - [Consistent weekly growth of \~250 new clicks](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=148.0)
      - [\~175 from new content](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
      - [\~80 from content refreshes](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=145.0)
  - [On track to hit 500 clicks target by mid-November](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)

### Website and Blog Updates

  - [Blog redesign nearly complete, launching end of day tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=668.0)
  - [New features include:](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
      - [Updated navigation bar](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
      - [Categorized content](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)
      - [Sidebar CTAs](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=695.0)
      - [Author pages](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [Infrastructure team working on final implementation details](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=791.0)

### Conversion Optimization

  - [Focus shifting to improving conversion rates from blog traffic](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Implementing intent signals:](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [Track users who read blog posts, submit email, and view pricing](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
      - [Use data to trigger outbound emails and ad retargeting](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Optimizing blog posts with stronger CTAs and conversion elements](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)

### Keyword Strategy

  - [Prioritizing improvement for key terms like "shoppable video" and "video commerce"](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Seeing increased impressions but need to improve click-through rates](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Discussing potential to increase content focus on priority keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)

### Backlink Strategy

  - [Organic backlinks increasing from high-authority sites](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Considering more targeted backlink campaigns for priority pages/keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Successful backlink campaigns can cost $70k+ over a year but can significantly improve rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1580.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jimmy to update reporting format for next week's meeting:](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
      - [Clarify total clicks, new blog clicks, existing blog clicks, and overall performance](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1676.0)
  - [Jorge to finalize blog launch and coordinate with Derek's team on infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1872.0)
  - [Continue optimizing for priority keywords, especially "shoppable video"](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1161.0)
  - [Explore options for increasing targeted backlink efforts](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1452.0)
  - [Monitor conversion rates as traffic increases and implement CRO strategies](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1083.0)
  - [Maintain increased content output (20 new articles, doubled content refreshes)](https://fathom.video/share/Lgza5xPey3sxyRxuUHTpBsg6Kthhg6pt?tab=summary&timestamp=1786.0)
